sessions.intent: Add PLang integration tests for untested module actions and engine behaviors

before.assumptions: LLM builder can reliably generate .pr files for all test patterns including error handling
before.risk: Builder may not generate correct .pr for complex patterns; some runtime behaviors may differ from expectations

sessions.plan: Create 7 test suites (ErrorHandling2, GoalCall, VariableOps, ContextVars2, Convert2, ListOps2, Math2), fix OpenAI env var, build and verify .pr files, run tests

actions.context: Changed env var name from 'OpenApiKey' to 'OPENAI_API_KEY' to match standard naming
Created 6 new PLang integration test suites covering previously untested actions
Dropped ErrorHandling2 test — LLM builder unreliably generates onError step property (1/4 builds correct)

after.health: All 29 PLang tests pass, all 1500 C# tests pass
after.notes: ErrorHandling2 dropped due to builder limitation. Builder issues documented: onError unreliability, .property stripping, stale .pr caching, build directory sensitivity.
